sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49009" key="qrani/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρᾰνίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n49009.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sword-fish</tr_>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ξιφίας</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1009.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θρανίας</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
